name: Orb Weaver Buggy
description: The most aggressive and mobile mount of the set. It hatches from 1 Orb Weaver Egg, 3 Blueberry Leather, 4 Red Ant Mandibles, and 3 Acorn Shell, turning the orb weaver into a platform for speed, web control, and aerial mobility.
behavior: It accelerates easily, jumps higher than any other buggy, and attacks almost continuously once it finds a target. If it has room to move, it mixes bites, lunges, and web-based control so the fight never stays still.
interactionWithPlayer: It can deploy a glider in mid-air, throw webs forward, and roar to scare or de-aggro small creatures. It also moves across natural web bridges with ease and cannot be trapped by its own webs.
interactionWithCreatures: Unlike the ant mounts, this one is aggressive toward almost any creature that crosses its path. Small targets often flee from intimidation, while medium ones get slowed or pinned by webs.
strategy: It is the ideal buggy for fast exploration and for deciding when fights happen. Use Intimidate to clear small creatures, Web Throw to pin dangerous targets, and the glider to reposition without losing momentum once the fight turns vertical.
respawnInfo: Incubation: 24 hours inside the Hatchery. Only one buggy can be active at a time. If you do not revive it within 90 seconds, it returns to its nest and becomes unavailable for 5 minutes.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite, fang flurry, offensive leap, and web-based control. It prioritizes mobility over raw durability.

inflicts: Its bites and leaps deal slashing damage, while webs pin or slow targets.
specialTraits: Uses web bridges and cannot be trapped by webs.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.description: Causes most small creatures to flee or instantly drop aggro if they were focused on the player. Costs 2 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Web Throw
abilities.description: Fires a web shot forward that slows or completely traps smaller creatures. Costs 3 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Fang Bite
abilities.description: A quick hit used to keep pressure while it repositions.

abilities.name: Fang Flurry
abilities.description: A short multi-bite combo once the target stays within reach.

abilities.name: Glide Leap
abilities.description: An offensive leap that can also transition into a glide when used from enough height.
